title: Reaction Chains
description: The evidence narrows things down — but not all the way. Mark every potion this pair could still produce.

hints.text: "Possible potions" means every outcome that occurs in at least one of the remaining 768 possible worlds. The clues haven't pinned down the exact alchemicals for ing3 and ing8, so multiple outcomes are possible — collect all of them.

Distribution across 768 worlds (ing3+ing8):
  B+: 112 worlds (14%)
  B-: 112 worlds (14%)
  G+: 256 worlds (33%)
  R+: 128 worlds (16%)
  R-: 64 worlds (8%)
  neutral: 96 worlds (12%)
